/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhwinfo_gpu.so -o ../../libhwinfo_gpu.so CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/apple/gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/linux/gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/windows/gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/windows/utils/wmi_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/apple/utils/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/linux/utils/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_gpu.dir/PCIMapper.cpp.o
